rationale: Every variable should be tied to its device, raw object, unit, measurement level and processing step.
operationalisation: Data dictionary; device dictionary; raw/intermediate/processed separation

rationale: Raw, intermediate and analysis-ready layers should remain distinct to preserve auditability.
Session-level, daily-level, signal-level, report-level and contextual-event variables should not be collapsed without metadata.
Processed data should be checked against required variables, types and plausible ranges before analysis.
Values produced by different devices should not be treated as interchangeable without paired-data checks.
Personal monitoring data should undergo automated and manual privacy checks before public release.
The artefact supports data management and reproducibility, not clinical diagnosis or treatment decisions.
